name: Nam Phrik Kaeng Khua (Kaeng Khua Curry Paste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried chilies in hot water for 15 minutes and remove the seeds.
2. Place all ingredients except the shrimp paste into a blender and blend until well combined.
3. Add the shrimp paste to the blender and mix once more to achieve a fine-textured paste, resulting in about 3/4 cup.
4. Store the paste in a glass jar in the refrigerator for up to 3-4 months.
